items.name: General
items.description: Clean, balanced, and natural—your go-to look with true-to-life colors and soft lighting. Effortlessly versatile for any style

items.name: iPhone
items.description: Natural light, casual framing, soft HDR glow. Looks real, but a little better

items.name: Realistic
items.description: No filters, just flawless clarity. Light, pores, fabric—everything exactly as it is, but better

items.name: DigitalCam
items.description: Harsh flash, timestamp corner, and raw textures. Feels like 2007 captured forever

items.name: Flight mode
items.description: Airports, terminals — everything designed to feel like you're traveling. Modern architecture, clean lines, and a subtle “main character leaves town” aura.

items.name: Sunset beach
items.description: Golden-hour dreams. The sky melts from purple to peach while you pose like you don’t know the sun’s watching. Glowy skin, backlit outlines, and luxury vacation stillness.

items.name: Mt. Fuji
items.description: Postcard surrealism. Crystal-blue skies, iconic mountain symmetry, and convenience store drama.

items.name: Tokyo Streetstyle
items.description: Layered looks, sharp silhouettes, and fearless color. A street-level runway of innovation and self-expression

items.name: Bimbocore
items.description: Hyperfeminine overload: glossed lips, tiny skirts, and confidence cranked to 100. Plastic fantastic, but make it powerful

items.name: CCTV
items.description: Grainy surveillance vibe. Raw, unfiltered and highly realistic

items.name: Y2K
items.description: Gloss, glitter, and baby tees. A shiny reboot of early 2000s maximalism—flip phones and all

items.name: RingSelfie
items.description: Manicured hands, glossy lips, and a flash that catches the sparkle. Casual flex, maximal impact

items.name: Spotlight
items.description: Direct light creating high-contrast drama, paparazzi flash, and instant icon energy

items.name: Y2K Posters
items.description: Chrome text, airbrushed skin, and floating objects. Early internet meets teen bedroom wall

items.name: Nail Check
items.description: Close-up hands showing off nail art, rings, and textures. Precision beauty with attitude

items.name: Gorpcore
items.description: Function becomes fashion. Technical fabrics, bulky sneakers, and colorblocked gear that looks runway-ready - on a hike or in the city

items.name: 90s Grain
items.description: Warm tones, film texture, and a soft blur—retro mood in every pixel

items.name: 0.5 Selfie
items.description: Front cam, half-body, mirror or not. Unfiltered fits and real-life lighting - effortlessly authentic

items.name: 0.5 Outfit
items.description: Shot from the waist down with wide-angle distortion. Casual, candid, and effortlessly cool—your fit, half-framed, full vibe

items.name: Medieval
items.description: Chainmail chic, velvet drapes, and candlelit intrigue. Courtly vibes with cinematic weight

items.name: Japandi
items.description: Minimalism with warmth. Clean lines, natural light, and a serene sense of balance between form and feeling

items.name: Coquette core
items.description: Soft focus and lace daydreams. Bows, blush, and a wink - sweetness laced with irony

items.name: Sand
items.description: Sculptural silhouettes in windswept dunes. Neutral tones, survivalist edge-high fashion lost in a dust storm

items.name: 2000s Cam
items.description: Low-rise everything, rhinestones, and visible thongs. Nostalgia wrapped in early paparazzi glam

items.name: Giant Accessory
items.description: One item exaggerated to surreal scale—bags, bows, or earrings blown up for visual drama

items.name: HairClips
items.description: Chunky, colorful, or pearl-lined-accessories that turn heads and frame the face with playful precision

items.name: Rainy Day
items.description: Moody skies, reflections in wet pavement, soft sweaters. A slow, cinematic quiet

items.name: Foggy Morning
items.description: Muted colors, blurred horizons, and quiet light. Dreamlike stillness in early hours

items.name: Avant-garde
items.description: Sculptural beauty, unexpected forms. A look that speaks in bold shapes and silent statements

items.name: Tumblr
items.description: Grainy gifs, soft blur, and blue-toned melancholy—effortlessly curated and emotionally charged

items.name: Through The Glass
items.description: Shot behind fogged-up windows or café panes. A quiet moment seen, not staged

items.name: Vintage PhotoBooth
items.description: Flash-lit nostalgia in strip form. Grain, glare, and a kiss of chaos

items.name: Fisheye
items.description: Exaggerated depth and playful proportions. Face or object up close, background stretched to infinity

items.name: Geominimal
items.description: Clean lines, geometric overlays. Sharp, modern, minimalist settings
Distorted realism of Aphex Twin with eerie edits, glitch vibes, cult-classic weirdness

items.name: Selfcare
items.description: Candles, skincare, robes. Glowing peace in muted tones and soft light

items.name: Babydoll MakeUp
items.description: Fluttery lashes, pouty lips, and porcelain skin-sweet meets surreal in a hyper-feminine glow-up

items.name: Fairycore
items.description: Glittery woodland fantasy. Soft pastels, magical sparkles, enchanted innocence

items.name: Office beach
items.description: Corporate meets coastal. Suits and sand, spreadsheets with sunglasses - chaotic and sun-bleached

items.name: Swords Hill
items.description: High fantasy on a mountain slope. Capes, steel, wind-blown drama—part legend, part editorial

items.name: Amalfi Summer
items.description: Lemon light, sunkissed skin, linen dresses fluttering on cobblestone-luxury by the sea

items.name: Creatures
items.description: Animalistic details fused with human edge, strange, eerie and beautiful

items.name: Grunge
items.description: Distressed denim, oversized flannel, and don’t-care hair. Moody, messy, iconic

items.name: Glazed doll skin makeup
items.description: Glass-like skin with high-shine finish. Dewy, doll-like, and flawlessly unreal

items.name: Invertethereal
items.description: Negative tones and ghostly hues. Dreamlike, eerie, and light turned inside out

items.name: Indie sleaze
items.description: Flash-lit chaos, smudged eyeliner, and blurry rebellion. Tumblr-era nightlife energy in its rawest, hottest form

items.name: Mixed Media
items.description: Layers of photo, paint, text, and texture. A visual collage with chaotic elegance

items.name: Paper Face
items.description: A face collaged from torn paper, textures, and cutouts-raw edges meet artistic expression. Mixed media magic with a surreal twist

items.name: 2000s Fashion
items.description: Flashy fits, shiny textures, and Y2K icons—low-rise, high-attitude, totally throwback

items.name: Overexposed
items.description: Washed-out whites, crushed detail, and intense brightness. A raw visual effect that feels accidental, emotional, and unfiltered

items.name: Long legs
items.description: Elongated limbs and stretched proportions. Stylized drama with a runway edge

items.name: Night Beach
items.description: Moonlit waves, dark silhouettes, and salt in the air. Intimate and a little unreal

items.name: 90’s Editorial
items.description: Retro fashion magazine style image with film grain, soft blur, moody colors, and pure nostalgia

items.name: Sitting on the Street
items.description: Laid-back pose meets city grit. Candid, cool, and consciously unbothered

items.name: Glitch
items.description: Pixel drag, color distortion, and digital noise. Beautiful errors in motion

items.name: FashionShow
items.description: Backstage flashes, bold looks, and runway energy—where chaos meets couture

items.name: Artwork
items.description: Framed moments with painterly depth. A still life of emotion, texture, and light

items.name: Graffiti
items.description: Spray textures, bold lines, and rebellious color. Raw energy in every frame

items.name: Angel Wings
items.description: Soft look with delicate wings giving dreamy and weightless

items.name: PixeletedFace
items.description: Retro-glitch vibe with a pixelated face—playful, edgy, straight out of an early-internet dream

items.name: Grillz Selfie
items.description: Flash-heavy close-up of shiny teeth, with grills, bold attitude, underground luxury

items.name: Shoe Check
items.description: A visual trend where the focus is on footwear, often captured from a top-down or ground-level angle

items.name: Bleached Brows
items.description: Barely-there brows, futuristic face. A blank canvas for bold energy and alien glam

items.name: Object Makeup
items.description: Collage-style layers. An object below, makeup above, colors duplicated for surreal, editorial face art

items.name: 360 cam
items.description: Wrap-around perspective with immersive distortion. Captures everything-warped, wide, and wonderfully weird

items.name: Duplicate
items.description: Echoed figures, mirrored forms, or repeated poses-surreal symmetry that bends perception

items.name: Library
items.description: Soft indoor lighting meets cozy academia. Perfect for quiet power, timeless knits, and capturing the stillness of thought between the shelves.

items.name: Escalator
items.description: Gliding style in motion. This preset captures that effortless  mall paparazzi look — structured outfits, steel gradients, and motion frozen in frame.

items.name: Gallery
items.description: Neutral walls, high taste. This preset frames your subject like a work of art — minimal, polished, and modern.

items.name: Crossing the street
items.description: Boss walk energy. Overhead angles, harsh midday shadows, and that perfect step mid-cross. Looks stolen from a fashion mag.

items.name: Sunbathing
items.description: Clear turquoise water, woven bags, towel texture, and heat-soaked skin.
